description: United National Dairy (KSA) demand sensing across the dairy network. Ingests hourly POS, current on-hand, and the Ramadan calendar; flags POS divergence, real-time shortage in the next 6 hours, and event-driven pre-position gaps; recommends re-forecast, intra-day transfer, or cold-chain pre-position before the next route delivery.
tooltip_text: UND POS divergence + Ramadan ramp + short-horizon shortage + route pre-position.

solve.label: 🔭 Network — scan all
solve.text: Scan my dairy network for the next 6 hours: which SKU × store has the biggest stockout risk right now, what's driving it, and what should I do before the next route delivery?

solve.label: SKU — LABAN-500ML
solve.text: For LABAN-500ML across the network, which stores are at greatest risk of stockout in the next 6 hours and what is the recommended pre-position plan?

solve.label: SKU × Route — LABAN on ROUTE-DAIRY-03 to STORE-EAST
solve.text: LABAN-500ML on ROUTE-DAIRY-03 to STORE-EAST shows >30% POS divergence and on-hand won't last to the next delivery — give me the action plan to close the gap before iftar.

analyse.label: SKU — MILK-FULL-1L
analyse.text: Analyse MILK-FULL-1L across the dairy network: which stores show the largest POS-vs-forecast divergence over the last 72 hours, and what's the underlying pattern?
